roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT FILED

/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 18 M PJ 1D/CTS 1/X  THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASFINE OF $145 PLUS $434 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $579,/VF2:150/FOP1: 3  MONTH/LCHEM/LVAL/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/CITE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/X:DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED MADD VIP, FOP, AND 25 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE/4019HALF/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/JAVS/977/X:JUDGE COLFAX AND ATTY, MOUSAVIAN IN THE COURTROOM/X:DA APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONTD:PRETRIAL - POSSIBLE CHANGE OF PLEA/DOPU:MILSS WAIVER/

/CAL: PTC/ORMS/X: AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE THROUGH OR MINIMUM, DEFENDANTTO ENROLL AND COMPLETE 25 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE, 3 MONTH FOP AND 1 MADD SESSION/CONTD: STATUS OF OR MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS/X: DEFENDANT ON 2H STANDBY/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT MAY INFORMALLY BEGIN THE FOLLOWING IN ORDER TO PLEA TO A CHARGE OF VC 23103;23103,5 AS A MISDEMEANOR AT ALATER DATE:/X:3 MONTH FOP/X:25 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE/X:1 MADD IMPACTVICTIM PANEL/CONT/2HR SB/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/X:PLEA IN ABSENTIA/DAWT//BWR:12-02-19/BWR1/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/987,2/MVARS/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & STATUS OF MVARS/SB:2HR/
/AMEND:3/X:COUNT 3 IS ADDED A 23103VC PURS TO 23103,5VC MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/
/CAL PTC/X DEFENDANT ON 2 HOUR STANDBY/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 16/TRANS 16 FORTHWITH FOR PLEA/
